title: bauhinia buchananii
intro: Bauhinia buchananii, also known as the mountain bauhinia, is a flowering plant species belonging to the family Fabaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Bauhinia buchananii include its potential to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as an antiseptic and astringent. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and extracts that are typically made by drying the leaves and roots, and then using them to create medicinal remedies.
